agents.name: Repository researcher
agents.role: Map relevant files, flows, tests, reusable patterns, risks, and unknowns before planning.

agents.name: Implementation planner
agents.role: Turn approved task context and research into a minimal, testable implementation plan.

agents.name: Developer
agents.role: Implement only the approved plan in the isolated workspace and record progress and blockers.

agents.name: Patch reviewer
agents.role: Review the verified patch against the task, research, and plan without editing or approving it.
